item.title: A quarter of a century!
item.description: At the start I struggled and never thought I'd make it through the first few weeks. Now here I am, 25 years later, healthy, happy and still sober. I thought my life was over when I had to stop drinking; in truth, it was only just starting.
item.dc:creator: jan27299

item.dc:creator: Sirdan3k

item.title: Luscious Tuesday gaming memes (phone clearing dump)
item.description:
1
2. Damn good cosplay
3. Masterpiece
4. When you underestimate your enemy
5. The mod you always asked for but never had the courage to make
6. Normal players vs Speedrunners
7. "When you need to be there yesterday"
8. Me in Zombie Games
9
10
11
12. Using mods be like
13. When you realize you went in and done goofed
14. This is lucky cow. May it bring you cool CPUs and high frame rates
15. How?! P.S, And finally I want to thank the 2 (Hi, Mom!) people that made it to end of the dump. I wanted to share with you that as well as browsing and posting on Imgur all day I'm also making a passion project of mine. If you liked the humor in this dump I think you will like the game too called "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse). It is inspired by "The Stanley Parable" and similar in tone and features funny signs like this one here. Can you imagine? A first person game mixed with humor? https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ Anyway, It would mean the world to me and my brother if you checked the game out on Steam and gave it a wishlist. It won't disappoint. I promise. Just do not press the big red button, tho.
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Yes Virginia, the tweet below is 100% real.
item.description: And as much as I don’t want to veer into a political discussion, the time of watching from the sidelines is officially over. I’ll give you one second and one guess as to which party no longer feels the need to hide their horrific, sub-intellectual, xenophobic, antisemitic, homophobic, anti-trans beliefs. They will whine, cry, and cheat to attain their goals, but in the end, common decency and critical thinking must prevail. We must stop their disgusting rhetoric of hatred now. We MUST vote every single one of them out office before it’s too late. Let’s call them out for their blind allegiance to a wannabe dictator. We must prevent them from passing more laws that restrict our democracy and the freedoms therein. The election is coming - vote them all out!
item.dc:creator: JamesWriting

item.description: and staying that way
item.dc:creator: m1oberon

item.title: Man proposes to girlfriend through Pokemon cards
item.dc:creator: inbox1114

item.title: The Ancient Texts: A Phone Clearing Meme Dump pt-10
item.description:
Bienvenue mon amis. Part 10 already, how time flies. You're getting so big, are you excited for grade 5? Anyway, I had the above happen to me this weekend. Making friends in a new city. Always nerve-racking.
We are still in mid-2019 and it is still wild to me how many Vax memes I have from that period. It's like we all had a feeling something was coming.
The ship is now also on fire.
Started doing this a few years ago and the double takes alone are worth it.
I want to feel like I'm cutting calories and my dog always wants them. Cant give him too many tho, lil chonker.
These were the ingredients to make the spookiest little girls. But after ingredient X was added shit really took a turn.
She leyft meh rosyas buyhhh the stayirsssss
Anxiety has been giving me stomach issues lately. Just makes me more anxious!
Ever smash one of these bad boys? Satisfying and dangerous, don't do it.
The original design for the standard USB port was double sided like the USB-C but was decided against to save money.
Stay hydrated
It's a good list.
Think about doing this every time I start a new character but chicken out.
I don't get the appeal but you do you. No judgement.
Had a couple moments of this at the party I went to. Just gotta savour it.
Ban plastic bags. There I said it.
Thank you for coming with me on this journey. Please return carts to the cart return upon leaving. And remember, dont let the bastards grind you down.
item.dc:creator: WaywardJester

item.title: My 15th favorite
item.description: Crossed-out the ones I have seen already, of the top of my head. Does anyone know if there's an updated list? This one's 4 year's old. Any movie I haven't seen yet but MUST be the next one?

item.title: Pant thief
item.description: Penny, the 4 month old feral farm kitten, is settling in just fine, little madam even nabbed my pants this morning, thankfully they were clean!!! **Edit** thanks everyone for making my pants so popular!! Penny, formerly Bambi, came from Cool for cats rehoming in Devon, they also have a cat cafe & boarding facilities, please check them out, they do great work! http://www.coolforcatscafe.co.uk/ The cardboard igloo came from Hobbycraft around Christmas 2022, although they don't seem to make that anymore, there is a wicked looking castle, Penny & Bonnie might be getting a new gift! https://www.hobbycraft.co.uk/colour-in-cardboard-castle-88cm/6602641000.html
item.dc:creator: CatsCatsCatsAndMoreCats

item.title: M&M Vending machine error reveals secret face image database of college students ... Facial-recognition data is typically used to prompt more vending machine sales.
item.description: Canada-based University of Waterloo is racing to remove M&M-branded smart vending machines from campus after outraged students discovered the machines were covertly collecting facial-recognition data without their consent. The scandal started when a student using the alias SquidKid47 posted an image on Reddit showing a campus vending machine error message, "Invenda.Vending.FacialRecognitionApp.exe," displayed after the machine failed to launch a facial recognition application that nobody expected to be part of the process of using a vending machine. Stanley sounded the alarm after consulting Invenda sales brochures that promised "the machines are capable of sending estimated ages and genders" of every person who used the machines—without ever requesting their consent. This frustrated Stanley, who discovered that Canada's privacy commissioner had years ago investigated a shopping mall operator called Cadillac Fairview after discovering some of the malls' informational kiosks were secretly "using facial recognition software on unsuspecting patrons." Only because of that official investigation did Canadians learn that "over 5 million nonconsenting Canadians" were scanned into Cadillac Fairview's database, Stanley reported. Where Cadillac Fairview was ultimately forced to delete the entire database, Stanley wrote that consequences for collecting similarly sensitive facial recognition data without consent for Invenda clients like Mars remain unclear. Stanley's report ended with a call for students to demand that the university "bar facial recognition vending machines from campus." A University of Waterloo spokesperson, Rebecca Elming, eventually responded, confirming to CTV News that the school had asked to disable the vending machine software until the machines could be removed. Students told CTV News that their confidence in the university's administration was shaken by the controversy. Some students claimed on Reddit that they attempted to cover the vending machine cameras while waiting for the school to respond, using gum or Post-it notes. One student pondered whether "there are other places this technology could be being used" on campus. https://arstechnica.com/tech-policy/2024/02/vending-machine-error-reveals-secret-face-image-database-of-college-students/
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

item.title: Rando Dumperino Bambino Burrito
item.description:
Dont mind if I do
Had to call a plumber today because something called cpvc that connected my outdoor faucet snapped inside my wall making a mess. Wish my shower had that kinda water pressure.
Me overtaking SSRIs to be extra drowsy and zombified
Drinking and texting
This goes for the ladies too
Most subjects, not to brag
Especially wfh
Herbitron is always watching
Orange, TX
San Jacinto Memorial La Porte, TX (TX indepence? Idk but theres an elevator that goes to the top and my gf and I had sex up there once)
When someone makes life a little harder and theres nothing you can do
As it has been burned into my memory so shall it be into yours.
Cat tax (Gia)
Dog tax (Sascha)
item.dc:creator: Whydoeseverythinghurt42

item.title: I found $1700
item.description: And I turned it into the police station. fast forward 90 days i go in to see if anyone has claimed it. And no one had. so you know what that means....NOTHING! Apparently the 90 day return policy to the person who turned it in is something only from tv shows and is not a real thing. Cause the police said they were keeping the money.
item.dc:creator: KingofRogues
